query:
ALTER TABLE web_app_scans 
ADD COLUMN scan_mode varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'passive' AFTER scan_type,
ADD COLUMN zap_ajax_spider_scan_id varchar(100) AFTER zap_active_scan_id,
ADD COLUMN detected_tech_stack text AFTER error_message,
ADD COLUMN llm_scan_config text AFTER detected_tech_stack,
ADD COLUMN scan_policy_name varchar(100) AFTER llm_scan_config,
ADD COLUMN auth_configured boolean DEFAULT false AFTER scan_policy_name,
ADD COLUMN ajax_spider_used boolean DEFAULT false AFTER auth_configured,
ADD COLUMN attack_chain_id varchar(100) AFTER ajax_spider_used,
ADD COLUMN caldera_operation_id varchar(100) AFTER attack_chain_id,
ADD COLUMN metasploit_session_id varchar(100) AFTER caldera_operation_id,
ADD COLUMN domain_intel_scan_id int AFTER metasploit_session_id;
